ddls:
CREATE TABLE "time_counters" (
  "counter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time counter */,
  "counter_name" TEXT /* Name of the counter (e.g., Second, Minute) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the counter (number of digits) */,
  "enabled_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the counter that enables this one */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum permissible value for this counter */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum permissible value for this counter */,
  "time_format" TEXT /* Format in which the counter is displayed (e.g., 'HH:mm:ss') */,
  "default_value" INTEGER /* Default value for the counter */,
  "is_system" INTEGER /* Indicates if the counter is a system-defined counter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the counter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the counter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("counter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time at which the event is scheduled */,
  "counter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time counter used for scheduling */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "timezone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time zone in which the event is scheduled */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., 'scheduled', 'completed', 'canceled') */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_timezone_id FOREIGN KEY ("timezone_id") REFERENCES time_zones ("timezone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_counter_id FOREIGN KEY ("counter_id") REFERENCES time_counters ("counter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_events" (
  "user_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-event mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the user is associated with */,
  "participation_type" TEXT /* Type of participation (e.g., attendee, organizer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user-event association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user-event association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_zones" (
  "timezone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time zone */,
  "timezone_name" TEXT /* Name of the time zone (e.g., UTC, EST) */,
  "utc_offset" TEXT /* UTC offset for the time zone */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the time zone is the default for the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the time zone was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the time zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timezone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification is triggered */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., 'scheduled', 'sent', 'failed') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
